name: Sausage Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a large saucepan.
2. Cook over medium-low heat until the sausage is heated through.
3. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until transparent, about 5 minutes.
4. Drain all but 2 tablespoons of fat from the sausage drippings.
5. Stir in flour and cook over medium-low heat for about 6 minutes or until the mixture bubbles and turns golden.
6. Gradually stir in milk, whisking continuously until smooth.
7. Add poultry seasoning, nutmeg, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce; stir to combine.
8. Cook, stirring frequently, until thickened, about 10-15 minutes.
9. To serve, slice biscuits and spoon gravy over the halves.
Serves 4-6.
